text:
End Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) Care (CEC) Model structure, in which dialysis facilities, nephrologists, and other health care providers form ESRD-focused accountable care organizations to provide higher-quality, cost-effective care for beneficiaries with late-stage chronic kidney disease (CKD) and ESRD. CMS designed the KCC model to delay the onset of ESRD, better prepare patients for dialysis, coordinate care across different healthcare settings, and incentivize kidney transplantation.
